label: MIRYA Academy
title: Discover MIRYA Through Live Sessions
description: Explore how MIRYA automates real business processes, accelerates digital transformation, and powers AI-driven document and workflow automation — live and interactive.
aboutLead: Join a live MIRYA online session to:
aboutFeatures: Watch MIRYA automate real workflows live
See Intelligent Document Processing in action
Learn practical use cases for your business
Ask your questions directly to our experts
cardDescription: See MIRYA in action with a guided live demonstration of no-code automation, Intelligent Document Processing, and self-optimizing workflows.
cardFooter: Choose your preferred date and join us.

sessions.label: Sessions
sessions.description: Select the format that matches your goals—from quick introduction to advanced automation and industry-focused use cases.
sessions.defaultFooter: Choose your preferred date and join us.

testimonialsSection.description: Harnessing the power of artificial intelligence to revolutionize industries and enhance human experiences.

items.text: The easiest automation tool we’ve ever used. Our team learned it in one day. A tool that works exactly with the systems we already have no integrations needed. We white-labeled MIRYA and now deliver automation to our clients under our brand. Game-changing.
items.author: David Anderson

items.text: Seeing MIRYA live transformed the way we evaluate automation — the team answered our toughest questions.” — Head of Ops, Finance. The demo of document processing workflows solved a major bottleneck for us.
items.author: David Anderson
